Armii  Krajowej  19,  42-200  Cz¸estochowa,  Poland (Dated:  June  19,  2018) The  model  for  the  cuprates  based  on  the  modiﬁed  electron-phonon  pairing  mechanism  has  been tested.  For  this  purpose,  the  superconductors  with  high  value  of  the  critical  temperature  have  been taken  into  consideration.  In  particular:  YBa Cu O − y ,  HgBa CuO 4+y ,  HgBa Cu − x Zn x O 4+y ,  and HgBa Ca Cu O 8+y .  It  has  been  shown  that  the  dependence  of  the  ratio  R  ≡ 2∆ (0) tot /k B T C  on the  doping  ( p )  can  be  properly  predicted  in  the  framework  of  the  presented  theory;  the  symbol ∆ (0) tot  denotes  the  energy  gap  amplitude  at  the  temperature  of  zero  Kelvin,  and  T C  is  the  critical temperature.
